mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, phone, department_id, position, hire_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM employee ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, email, phone, department_id, position, hire_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM employee WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.department_id, d.name AS department_name, e.position, e.hire_date, e.status, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{id}

SELECT e.id, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.department_id, d.name AS department_name, e.position, e.hire_date, e.status, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM employee e INNER JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id ORDER BY e.id
SELECT id, name, email, phone, department_id, position, hire_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM employee WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, email, phone, department_id, position, hire_date, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{departmentId}, #{position}, #{hireDate}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position = #{position}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
